Event: Spring Festival 2024
Event Date: 01/03/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AR40


Other locations the gear can be found
Trade Fair
Friar Tuck Tuck Outfit

Once in a while, the armor wearer surrounds themself and all allied mages with a shield equal to 60% of the spell power of the armor wearer and all allied mages. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for 5 sec. Also, the armor wearer and all allied mages restore 30% of their max health for 5 sec.
The healing rate of the armor wearer and all allied mages is increased by 25% for the duration of the battle.

Requirements: 98-100
